repos.name: MadsLorentzen/ai-job-search
repos.description: AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.
repos.descriptionZh: 基于 Claude Code 构建的人工智能驱动的职位申请框架。叉开它，填写你的个人资料，让克劳德评估工作，定制简历，写求职信，并为你的面试做好准备。

repos.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
repos.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
repos.descriptionZh: AI 编码代理的生产级工程技能。

repos.name: ruvnet/RuView
repos.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
repos.descriptionZh: π RuView 将商用 WiFi 信号转化为实时空间智能、生命体征监测和存在检测 - 所有这些都无需视频像素。

repos.name: TencentCloud/TencentDB-Agent-Memory
repos.description: TencentDB Agent Memory delivers fully local long-term memory for AI Agents via a 4-tier progressive pipeline, with zero external API dependencies.
repos.descriptionZh: 腾讯数据库代理内存通过 4 层渐进式管道为 AI 代理提供完全本地的长期内存，且外部 API 依赖性为零。

repos.name: prisma/prisma
repos.description: Next-generation ORM for Node.js & TypeScript | PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, SQLite, MongoDB and CockroachDB
repos.descriptionZh: Node.js 和 TypeScript 的下一代 ORM | PostgreSQL、MySQL、MariaDB、SQL Server、SQLite、MongoDB 和 CockroachDB

repos.name: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
repos.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
repos.descriptionZh: AI 代理技能可研究 Reddit、X、YouTube、HN、Polymarket 和网络上的任何主题，然后综合得出有依据的摘要

repos.name: iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
repos.description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
repos.descriptionZh: OfficeCLI 是第一个也是最好的 Office 套件，专为 AI 代理构建，用于读取、编辑和自动化 Word、Excel 和 PowerPoint 文件。免费、开源、单一二进制文件，无需安装 Office。

repos.name: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
repos.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
repos.descriptionZh: 从 Anthropic 中提取的系统提示 - Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、Claude Code、Claude Design。 OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 思维、GPT 5.5 即时、Codex。 Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash、3.1 Pro、反重力。 xAI - Grok、Cursor、Copilot、VS Code、Perplexity 等。定期更新。

repos.name: obra/superpowers
repos.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
repos.descriptionZh: 有效的代理技能框架和软件开发方法。

repos.name: alibaba/zvec
repos.description: A lightweight, lightning-fast, in-process vector database
repos.descriptionZh: 轻量级、快如闪电的进程内矢量数据库

repos.name: Diolinux/PhotoGIMP
repos.description: A Patch for GIMP 3+ for Photoshop Users
repos.descriptionZh: 面向 Photoshop 用户的 GIMP 3+ 补丁

repos.name: wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
repos.description: This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities
repos.descriptionZh: 这是 Claude 的 MCP 服务器，为其提供终端控制、文件系统搜索和 diff 文件编辑功能

repos.name: bradautomates/claude-video
repos.description: Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.
repos.descriptionZh: 让克劳德能够观看任何视频。 /watch 下载、提取帧、转录，然后将其全部交给 Claude。

repos.name: TencentCloud/CubeSandbox
repos.description: Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.
repos.descriptionZh: 适用于 AI 代理的即时、并发、安全和轻量级沙箱。
